title: processed-notes.v1
description: The processed-notes contract: the per-meeting cleaned-transcript stream proc:meeting:{row_id} (agent-worker[Py] → meeting-api db-writer[Py] + agent-api SSE). A stream entry carries `note` (JSON Note) + optional `params` (JSON Params), or is the terminal ViewEnd marker. Cross-process agent→meetings seam (P4); the agent-worker is the single writer (P23); ADR 0027.

Note.description: One cleaned note, 1:1 with a transcript segment (id == segment_id). Re-emitting an id UPGRADES the note in place (baseline at ingest, LLM polish per beat) — consumers upsert by id, never append duplicates.

id.description: the source segment_id — the upsert key

chapter.description: running chapter heading; may be cleared by a later pass

pass.description: rewrite pass that produced this text (0 = ingest baseline)

frozen.description: true once no further passes may rewrite this note

Params.description: Provenance stamped on note entries: what pipeline/provider/model produced the cleaning. Persisted verbatim into the durable view's params (reproducibility).

ViewEnd.description: The terminal marker (ADR 0027): the worker XADDs it after its final post-session_end beat — the stream is COMPLETE at this entry. The db-writer flushes the durable view on it (a missing marker is covered by a bounded deadline, never assumed); the live SSE closes on it.

cursor.description: the last raw tc:meeting:{row_id} stream id processed — makes completion auditable
